title: Reconfigurable Microwave Metadevices Based on Organic Electrochemical Transistors
abstract: We demonstrate an organic electrochemical transistor gated microwave metadevice using PEDOT:PSS electrochemical gating to tune metasurface resonance and wavefront response in fabricated low-voltage devices.

title: Electrochemically Mutable Soft Metasurfaces
abstract: An OMIEC soft metasurface changes optical constants through reversible electrochemical doping, enabling tunable visible and near-infrared metasurface pixels in measured flexible devices.

title: Programmable Diffractive Deep Neural Network Based on a Digital-Coding Metasurface Array
abstract: A programmable digital coding metasurface performs diffractive neural network computing and classification with independently controlled metasurface elements.
